sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_var(
		$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT MAX(menu_order) FROM $wpdb->posts
			WHERE post_type = %s AND post_status IN ('publish', 'pending', 'draft', 'private', 'future')",
			$post_type
		)
	)

sinks.expression: wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to duplicate this post.', 'post-duplicator' ) )
wp_die( esc_html__( 'Duplication is disabled for this post type.', 'post-duplicator' ) )

			$post_type
		)
	)

		)
